title: PolyPokémon
description: This mod allows players to disguise themselves as Pokémon from the Cobblemon mod and supports multiplayer.
body:
This mod allows players to disguise themselves as Pokémon from the Cobblemon mod, fully multiplayer compatible. 

Main Features:
- Use the command `/disguise <PokémonName>` to transform into a Pokémon.
- Advanced options: `/disguise <PokémonName> level=XX shiny` to set level and shiny status.
- `/disguise clear` to remove your disguise.
- Flying-type Pokémon grant players flight ability; Water-type Pokémon grant underwater breathing.
- Synchronizes hitboxes with the disguise to match the Pokémon's size.
- Supports servers: disguises persist in multiplayer even after rejoining.
- Crouch to refresh pose and update hitbox after changing models.
- Automatically switches to third-person view when entering the game or changing models to prevent first-person crashes with shiny models.
